title: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs
innovation_summary: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs: Motivated by this, we propose a simple method, Self-Guided TTT (S-TTT): before adaptation, the model identifies the evidence spans it should learn from, and the standard.
